overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character ascends an illuminated staircase, traverses a covered walkway with the 'Wild Blue Hotel & Spa' sign, and crosses a street in a dense commercial district with massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with crosswalk and illuminated staircase

agents.ego_description: walking toward an illuminated staircase at a crosswalk

entered.detail: tall building facade covered with large glowing digital advertisements
white zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt road
wide concrete staircase with cyan neon light strips on the steps
short black and yellow posts lining the edge of the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic city street at night, approaching a crosswalk with an illuminated staircase visible ahead. The street is lined with bollards and digital billboards adorn the surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit outdoor staircase between high-rise buildings

events.description: begins ascending the illuminated staircase from street level
reaches the top of the stairs and enters a covered walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the neon-lit stairs following a pedestrian in white clothing

notable_agents.action: walking up the stairs ahead of the camera wearing white clothing

entered.detail: metal handrail with integrated cyan neon lighting
futuristic skyscrapers and digital billboards visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Ascending a wide outdoor staircase illuminated with cyan neon lights, following a pedestrian toward an upper city level. The stairway is flanked by dark building walls with neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with reflective floors and neon lighting

events.description: passing the illuminated 'Wild Blue Hotel & Spa' sign on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through a sleek covered corridor with reflective floors and neon accents

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian passage with high ceilings and dark walls
highly polished dark floor reflecting the neon lights above
large illuminated cyan sign reading 'WILD BLUE HOTEL & SPA' mounted on the wall
transparent structural columns with internal lighting
continuous cyan neon lines running along the floor and walls

segments.scene_description: Walking through a modern covered walkway with highly reflective floors and cyan neon accent lighting. The corridor features the 'Wild Blue Hotel & Spa' sign and glass structural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with giant digital billboards and street crossing

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with massive digital billboards and futuristic architecture
crossing a street with yellow zebra stripes while futuristic vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: crossing a busy street in a neon-lit commercial district after exiting the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving past on the street
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: vast open space surrounded by towering buildings with digital facades
massive illuminated advertising screens covering building walls including a prominent red billboard
tall modern structures with glass exteriors and exposed structural frameworks
broad yellow zebra crossing stripes on the road surface
paved pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees in planters

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a vast open plaza surrounded by towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards. The character crosses a street with yellow crosswalk markings, sharing the space with other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles drive past.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit city street, ascending through a structured corridor and emerging into a vast, towering commercial plaza. It begins by moving along a futuristic road lined with bollards and digital billboards, heading directly toward an illuminated staircase. As the camera ascends the wide stairs, the environment shifts into a narrow passage of cyan neon lights and dark walls, following a pedestrian toward an upper city level. The scene then transitions into a modern covered walkway with highly reflective floors and a prominent Wild Blue Hotel & Spa sign before finally opening up into a massive open plaza. This final expansion reveals a dense district of towering buildings and giant digital billboards as the camera crosses a yellow-marked street amidst flowing traffic and other pedestrians.
